_comment: This repo ships only pytorch_model.bin (no safetensors), so include fetches the .bin and convert_to_safetensors re-saves it as model.safetensors (dropping the .bin). Revision pinned for reproducible builds; bump from https://huggingface.co/wukevin/tcr-bert/commits/main. Apache-2.0 from the upstream github.com/wukevin/tcr-bert LICENSE, shipped verbatim in ./LICENSE.
